mapper.select: SELECT af.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, ac.category_name FROM archive_file af LEFT JOIN student s ON af.student_id = s.pk_student LEFT JOIN archive_category ac ON af.category_id = ac.pk_category WHERE af.pk_archive_file = #{pkArchiveFile}

SELECT af.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, ac.category_name FROM archive_file af LEFT JOIN student s ON af.student_id = s.pk_student LEFT JOIN archive_category ac ON af.category_id = ac.pk_category WHERE af.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY af.upload_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO archive_file (student_id, category_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, description, status, upload_user_id) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{categoryId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{description}, #{status}, #{uploadUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM archive_file WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE archive_file SET file_path = #{filePath} WHERE pk_archive_file = #{pkArchiveFile}
